items.summary: Ford said its EV sales fell by 40.7% during the quarter compared with a year earlier, while sales of its F-Series trucks, including the F-150, declined 11%.

items.title: Autonomous drone startup Quantum Systems raises $1.2 billion as investors pile into defense
items.summary: Defense tech startups are raising record amounts on both sides of the Atlantic amid a flurry of investment in the sector.

items.title: Americans are paying record prices for steak. Here's why demand isn't cracking
items.summary: Despite record beef prices, Americans aren't giving up steak. Consumers are treating beef as an affordable luxury and prioritizing it for special occasions.

items.title: Led by Buc-ee’s and new rival Dolly Parton, America’s gas station chains are in a mega-sizing era
items.summary: Gas station chains led by Buc-ee's are coming closer to rivaling America's big box stores in size, and Dolly Parton is getting in on the retail trend.

items.title: Microsoft commits $2.5 billion and 6,000 employees to new AI implementation unit
items.summary: Microsoft is the latest tech company to form a business focused on helping customers understand and implement artificial intelligence.
